sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82782" key="petro/blhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πετρό-βλητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n82782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pelted with stones</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n82782.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">affected by the stone</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεφροί</foreign> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
